title: Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults - 5 Powerful Cleaning & Whitening Modes with Soft Dupont Bristles, 2 Hours Quick Charge for 60 Days, IPX7 Waterproof Travel Portable Oral Dental Care Kit (Green)
features: 🦷【Smart Sonic Toothbrush】- Our electric toothbrush uses an ultra-powerful and industry-leading motor to drive the liquid between the teeth and deep into the gum line, effectively dissolving stains on the surface of the teeth. Provides superior cleaning by delivering soothing micro-pulses to improve gum health. Removes up to 10 times more plaque than a manual toothbrush, helps whiten teeth.

🦷【5 Modes Ultra Clean】- The sonic toothbrush has 5 vibration modes, clean (mild), white (strong), polish (strong inversion frequency), massage (mild inversion frequency) and sensitive (soft). You can choose stronger or lighter modes according to different oral and gum conditions. Get healthier gums, fresher breath and whiter teeth with this low-noise, lightweight sonic toothbrush.

🦷【Smart Timer Reminder】 - The electric toothbrush has a standard 2-minute brushing timer to ensure scientific brushing time. Pausing every 30 seconds to remind you to change and move on to the next brushing area, the smart toothbrush helps you develop good brushing habits. And the rechargeable toothbrush has an automatic memory function, which can record the mode used when it was turned off last time.

🦷【Large Battery Capacity, IPX7 Waterproof】- The long-life rechargeable toothbrush has a battery indicator light, has a low battery reminder and automatically cuts off the power when fully charged. The large battery capacity can be used for up to 60 days in just 2 hours with fast charging (2 times a day). The IPX7-rated fully sealed charging port is more secure and waterproof, and can be used in bathtubs and showers.

🦷【Gift Box Packaging Included】- Our electric toothbrush comes in a premium gift box packag. Includes 1 Sonic Electric Toothbrush, 2 DuPont Brush Heads, 1 Charging Cable, 1 Travel Case for Electric Toothbrush Handle and Brush Heads. You can also find detailed instructions and a support contact manual. Perfect as a gift for your family and friends.
🦷We provide you with 1 year warranty service. If you have any questions, please contact us first, we will provide you with satisfactory customer service within 24 hours.

reviews.title: Superior Brushing Experience
reviews.text: This electric toothbrush is the best I've ever used. It charged quickly and lasts. It is comfortable in my hands through the entire brushing process. It has average buzzing sound. There are multiple intensities of bruising power for different parts of my mouth. My teeth went from obvious coffee drinker to noticeably whiter and healthier. The bristles are gentle regardless of which setting I used. The narrow head allows me to easily brush my back teeth and gums.

reviews.title: Good quality product.

reviews.title: More like the impossible-to-find-Fairywill
reviews.text: This replaces a previously-ordered wireless-charging brush.  Reason for this is that it's lighter, takes a common brushhead (and we have the soft-bristle heads from previously).  Has a plug-in charger, i.e. not wireless, so that works, easy to travel with, don't have to take an induction charger with us. Also, the 30-second indicator is easy to hear/feel.

reviews.title: I like it but room for improvement

title: Sound Feelings Toothbrush - Basic, KIDS, 4-Pack, Extra-Soft
description: Our kids plain toothbrush is perfect for little ones who are just learning to brush their teeth. The bristles are of the same stiffness as our “x-soft” adult model but instead of 47 tufts, they have just 24 tufts. Though we call it our “kids” brush, many adults actually like the control they have with the smaller cleaning surface that this brush provides. 4 toothbrushes per pack. This is NOT a flimsy "disposable" style toothbrush. It is a quality, x-soft-bristle toothbrush with a solid handle like you grew up with. All the bristles are at the same level for the most even cleaning capability. Compare to the older style GUM, Colgate and Just the Basics from CVS brands. No crazy "ergonomic" handles. No multi-color bristles. No varying-length bristles. No bent heads. Just a well-made classic toothbrush! Because the Sound Feelings toothbrush has a traditional flat top, it actually makes better surface contact with all surfaces within your mouth than "modern" multilevel brushes." All toothbrushes are INDIVIDUALLY-WRAPPED in cellophane for maximum sterility. Certified BPA-free, Phthalate-free. Please search on Amazon for ALL VERSIONS of our toothbrushes from Sound Feelings: Soft, Extra Soft, Medium, Hard, Extra-Hard and Kids, or Sampler, if you aren't sure.

reviews.title: Great Value!
reviews.text: Fits my Oral B electric toothbrush. Bristle style is a little different than what I'm used to. But it cleans my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement toothbrush heads. Cant beat the price vs the comparable name brand.

reviews.title: Works fine. Medium soft.
reviews.text:
These are perfectly good replacement toothbrush heads.
They're what I would call a medium-soft bristle, which is about as soft as I like.

Minor points:
Many replacements now come with plastic hoods that snap on to protect the brush from airborne contaminates. These don't.

OEM brushes let you swap the little colored rings on the base, so you can always keep your favorite color. These don't. They have different colors, but they can't be changed.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text:
Replacement brush heads can be so expensive. That's why I love finding value replacements online.
Nice price for the 4 brush heads. These are good for one person for a year at least.
Brushes are soft so no damaging my gums or teeth.
Works perfect with my oral b.

reviews.title: Fits my electric toothbrush
reviews.text: Just like the original except the price.With the originals price keep going up, this is a very good alternative. shipping was quick.

reviews.title: Fits perfect, soft feeling, strong
reviews.text:
I've been using OralB floss action toothbrush heads for a long time.

While these aren't floss action they clean my teeth nicely.

They fit the OralB toothbrush perfectly, actually felt a little click when I connected it.

The bristles are softer than the brush heads I've been using.

After almost a week of use they seem to be holding up well and feel very strong while using them.

At a little over $2 per head they are a pretty good deal.

Kids replacement brush heads has special, smaller bristles which provide gentle, extra-soft brushing and make it ideal for the smaller teeth and mouth-size of children. Recommended for children from 3 years onwards.

Features- 1. Cleans teeth and massages gently 2. Inter-dental tips : Penetrate hard-to-reach areas 3. Effectively removes plaque without irritating 4. Indicator bristles : Fade halfway to signal when to replace your brush head.

reviews.title: Check the size
reviews.text: Disappointed, I read it wrong and thought these were official oral b replacement heads. It’s smaller than the original one on my sons toothbrush and just doesn’t feel durable. I guess time will tell.

reviews.title: Bristles are harder than advertised.
reviews.text:
The description states that it has 'Extra-Soft Bristles' which is why I purchased it.
I've found this is not the case.
They are not the hardest bristles, but they're not as soft as advertised.

reviews.title: Were they kidding?
reviews.text:
Not soft at all.
Has a piece that sticks out of the middle.
Totally inappropriate for children!
To be used with an Oral-B toothbrush that is so harsh?
I contacted the seller before I bought but never got a reply.

reviews.title: Good value
reviews.text: Good deal compared to buying name brand but they do feel like cheap plastic and they’re not the softest. Worth it though to save some money if you want to change them out as often as you should. The oral b brand replacements are too expensive IMO.

reviews.title: Good

reviews.title: great deal
reviews.text: Really cannot pick because of the price. Item as described and came with a very simple bib. These work as awesome teethers for my twins but in order to make it work for toothbrushing independence, you do need a cooperative toddler who's willing to bite down and keep the teeth between the brushes. If your kids are willing to bite down and brush with these, they work great for encouraging toddlers to maintain healthy dental hygiene. I think it's already awesome for the price and works great as a teether.

title: Philips Sonicare 4100 Electric Rechargeable Power Toothbrush, Black, with Genuine Optimal Plaque Control Replacement Toothbrush Heads, White, 3 Pack
description: Remove plaque and experience a deep, effective clean with Sonicare technology, removing up to 5x-7x more plaque vs. a manual toothbrush. Sonicare technology gently pulses water between your teeth, for a month's worth of manual brushing in just 2 minutes. The QuadPacer lets you know when you've spent the optimal amount of time on each section of your mouth while the SmarTimer signals when your 2 minutes is up. The pressure sensor flashes red to remind you to ease off, helping to prevent gum recession, while the 2 intensity settings ensure a comfortable clean that’s right for you. Going electric might feel like a big step, but with this brush you’re in safe hands. Its slim ergonomic design and familiar-shaped head gives you everything you need for an effective clean. The kit includes 1 Philips Sonicare 4100 electric toothbrush, 1 Optimal Plaque Control (C2) brush head and 1 USB charger (wall adaptor not included). An additional 3 pack of Optimal Plaque Control (C2) brush heads included.
features: Removes up to 5x-7x more plaque vs. a manual toothbrush. Battery life up to 14 days
